- ); -} - --- a/server/routes/instagram-boost.ts +++ b/server/routes/instagram-boost.ts @@ -1 @@ - +import { Router, Request, Response } from 'express'; +import { authenticate } from '../middleware/auth'; +import { db } from '../db'; +import { conversions } from '../db/schema'; + +const router = Router(); + +/** + * Track conversion event for a product + */ +router.post('/track-conversion', authenticate, async (req: Request, res: Response) => { + try { + const { productId, userId, eventName } = req.body; + + if (!productId || !userId || !eventName) { + return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Missing required fields' }); + } + + await db.insert(conversions).values({ + productId, + userId, + eventName, + timestamp: new Date(), + }); + + res.json({ success: true }); + } catch (error: any) { + console.error('Error tracking conversion:', error); + res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: 'Error tracking conversion' }); + } +}); + +export default router; + --- a/server/db/schema.ts +++ b/server/db/schema.ts @@ -1 @@ -// Re-export schema for server usage +import { pgTable, serial, text, timestamp, varchar } from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core'; -export * from '../../db/schema'; + +export const conversions = pgTable('conversions', { + id: serial('id').primaryKey(), + productId: varchar('product_id', { length: 255 }).notNull(), + userId: varchar('user_id', { length: 255 }).notNull(), + eventName: text('event_name').notNull(), + timestamp: timestamp('timestamp').defaultNow().notNull(), +}); +
